title: From Side Hustle to Full-Time: My Freelance Web Development Journey
description: After years of part-time freelancing, I've gone all-in with Digital Space as a full-time frontend developer. Here's what's next for my journey in React, Next.js, web design, SEO, digital marketing, and hosting.
content:
Since January 2018, I've been building a freelance career in web development and design—often alongside other commitments. As of June 2025, I'm excited to announce that Digital Space is now my full-time focus. Over the past seven years, I've worked with agencies, startups, and direct clients, specialising in frontend development with React and Next.js. My projects have ranged from custom web apps and pixel-perfect designs to performance optimisation and technical SEO. Going full-time means I can offer even more to my clients:
  • Custom Web Development: Senior-level React and Next.js builds for scalable, high-performance websites and apps.
  • Web Design: User-focused, conversion-driven interfaces tailored to your brand.
  • SEO Optimisation: Technical and on-page SEO to help your business get found.
  • Digital Marketing: Strategy and implementation to grow your digital footprint.
  • Hosting & Support: Reliable, secure hosting and ongoing maintenance.
Whether you're an agency needing extra frontend capacity or a business owner looking to level up your digital presence, I'm here to help. My goal is to deliver clean, maintainable code, strong UI/UX, and real business results. If you're looking for a frontend developer with deep React and Next.js expertise, plus services like SEO, digital marketing, and hosting, let's talk. I'm open for new projects and ongoing partnerships. Ready to get started?
Contact me or connect on LinkedIn.

seo.title: Full-Time Freelance Frontend Developer: React, Next.js, Web Design, SEO, Digital Marketing & Hosting | Digital Space
seo.description: Digital Space is now full-time! Senior frontend developer Tom Dowling shares his journey from part-time freelance to full-time web development, React, Next.js, web design, SEO, digital marketing, and hosting services.
